---
name: Profile request
about: Request compression support for a specific MCP (no TypeScript required)
labels: feature, P2: Medium
---

## Which MCP?

<!-- Name and link to the MCP. e.g. "mcp-notion" — https://github.com/... -->

## Tool names

<!-- List the tool names you want compressed. e.g. mcp__notion__search, mcp__notion__get_page -->

## What the output looks like

<!-- Paste a sample response (or describe the shape). Helps determine the right strategy. -->

## Fields worth keeping

<!-- Which fields matter? e.g. id, title, status, url — everything else can be dropped. -->

## Can you contribute it?

<!-- If you'd like to write the profile yourself, see:
     https://github.com/sakebomb/mcp-recall/blob/main/docs/profile-schema.md
     https://github.com/sakebomb/mcp-recall-profiles/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md

     If you've already used this MCP, try:
     mcp-recall profiles retrain <mcp-name>
     It may suggest the right fields automatically. -->
